news.t: Why Trump's China Summit Could End the Chip Stocks Rally

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Nuveen ICE Short Term Municipal Bond ETF (SHM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of publicly traded short-term tax-exempt US municipal bonds rated AA- or better. SHM was launched on Oct 10, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: ICE 1-5 Year AMT-Free US Select Municipal Index

data.title: Why Trump's China Summit Could End the Chip Stocks Rally
data.text: China's access to advanced chip manufacturing tools is likely to be on the table when Trump and Xi meet later this week.
